zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Walton於1450年出生在英國瓦維其可爾奧可爾時，他的父親Sir William Roger Walton27歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Dunstroke25歲。他和Kathleen D Bosworth至少有1個女兒。他去世於1533年在英國斯塔福爾享年83歲。

nameMeanings.name: Walton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Walton, which are named with Old English walh ‘foreigner, Briton, serf’ (genitive plural wala), wald ‘woodland’, wall ‘wall’, or wælla ‘well, spring, stream’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

History: George Walton (1741–1804) signed the Declaration of Independence. He was born in Prince Edward County, VA, whither his grandfather had emigrated from England in 1682. He moved to Savannah, GA, and became governor of GA and a prominent jurist.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Walton was born in 1450, in Oxhill, Warwickshire, England, his father, Sir William Roger Walton, was 27 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth Dunstroke, was 25. He had at least 1 daughter with Kathleen D Bosworth. He died in 1533, in Staffordshire, England, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Walton est né en 1450, à Oxhill, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Roger Walton, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Dunstroke, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Kathleen D Bosworth. Il est décédé en 1533, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Walton 1450 in Oxhill, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Roger Walton 27 und seine Mutter Lady Elizabeth Dunstroke 25. Er hatte mit Kathleen D Bosworth mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1533 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Walton è nato il nel 1450 nel Oxhill, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, Sir William Roger Walton, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Lady Elizabeth Dunstroke, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Kathleen D Bosworth. Morì nel 1533, nel Staffordshire, England, all'età di 83 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Waltonが1450年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアオクスヒルで生まれた時，父Sir William Roger Waltonは27歳，母Lady Elizabeth Dunstrokeは25歳であった。彼はKathleen D Bosworthとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1533年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで83歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Walton(이)가 1450년 영국 워윅실르 스힐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Roger Walton(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Dunstroke(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Kathleen D Bosworth(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1533년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Walton nasceu em 1450, em Oxhill, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Roger Walton, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Dunstroke, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Kathleen D Bosworth. Ele faleceu em 1533, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 83 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Walton родился в 1450 г. в местности оксхилл, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Roger Walton было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Dunstroke, 25. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Kathleen D Bosworth. Он умер в 1533 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 83 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Walton nació en 1450, en Oxhill, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Roger Walton, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Dunstroke, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Kathleen D Bosworth. Murió en 1533, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 83 años.
